name: insider-mass-download
description: Departing employee suddenly downloads hundreds of files from SharePoint / OneDrive in a short window. Trigger: Detect-MassFileDownload (>50 files in 5 minutes).
expectedFindings: >50 files downloaded within the detection window
Outbound shares to personal Gmail / Hotmail / proton domains
recoveryNotes: Engage legal + HR before deleting data the user may have legitimately authored. Preserve the snapshot for the duration of any litigation hold. Do NOT force password change until legal has captured device images.
